content_post.lesson: Always validate LinkedIn post length against 3000 char limit before posting
Never use Google Drive links for LinkedIn images — they may be stale. Always pull from Notion page blocks
Check for duplicate posts before celebrating success. Verify actual posted content, not just script logs

communication.lesson: CLI uses --target not --to — exit 0 does not mean success. Always verify actual delivery

tool_integration.lesson: Always check config/ directory and service-registry.md before initiating OAuth. Direct credentials exist for Notion, Telegram, Gmail

config_system.lesson: Never bulk-overwrite config bindings without understanding each binding's required schema. Always backup and validate after editing openclaw.json

cron_automation.lesson: OpenClaw cron tool can fail silently. For critical one-shot reminders, system crontab is more reliable
